backend/main.mo: Main actor for the e-commerce backend, defining Product, Order, and Cart modules with CRUD operations, user profile management, cart management, and order placement/status updates, all gated by access control checks.
backend/migration.mo: Data migration module that transforms legacy products (with Blob images) to the new product format (with structured image objects) and seeds 10+ sample products across electronics, clothing, and home/kitchen categories.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that SeedProducts.tsx was updated to include an expanded set of sample products matching the backend seed data, with high confidence and linked to test REQ-13.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing JSON summaries of all frontend source files, describing each component, page, hook, and config file's purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, primary, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for home, catalog, checkout, order success, order history, and admin dashboard, and conditionally shows a profile setup modal for newly authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/AddProductForm.t: Dialog form component for creating or editing a product, with fields for name, description, category, price, stock quantity, and image URL, wired to create/update mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/AdminGuard.tsx: A route guard component that restricts access to admin pages, showing appropriate messages if the user is unauthenticated, loading, or lacks admin privileges.
frontend/src/components/CartDrawer.tsx: A slide-out sheet drawer displaying cart items with quantity controls, removal, and a checkout button, using the CartContext for state management.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main app layout component providing a sticky header with navigation links, cart icon with badge, login/logout controls, and a mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/OrderCard.tsx: A collapsible card component that displays a single order's summary (ID, date, status, total) and expandable item details.
frontend/src/components/OrderManagementT: An admin table component that lists all orders and allows updating each order's status via a dropdown select, with loading skeletons and an empty state.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: A product display card showing image, category badge, name, description, price, stock status, and an add-to-cart button with brief confirmation feedback.
frontend/src/components/ProductManagemen: Renders an admin table of products with add, edit, and delete actions, using query hooks for data fetching and an alert dialog for delete confirmation.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Displays a modal dialog prompting new users to enter their name to complete profile setup, submitting via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/SeedProducts.tsx: Provides a button to bulk-create a predefined set of sample products (electronics, clothing, home & kitchen) using the useCreateProduct hook.
frontend/src/context/CartContext.tsx: Defines a React context and provider for managing shopping cart state, exposing add, remove, update quantity, clear, item count, and total price utilities.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login, logout, identity, and status state to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for products (list, create, update, delete) and orders (place, history, list all, update status), wiring them to the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for a warm neutral/amber color palette in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin-only dashboard page with tabs for managing products and orders, and a seed products banner shown when no products exist.
frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx: Checkout page that displays an order summary with cart items, handles authentication state, and submits orders via the placeOrder mutation before navigating to the success page.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page featuring a hero banner, a features bar, and a featured products section showing up to four products loaded from the backend.
frontend/src/pages/OrderHistory.tsx: Authenticated order history page that lists all past orders using OrderCard components, with loading skeletons and an empty state prompt.
frontend/src/pages/OrderSuccess.tsx: Order confirmation page displayed after a successful purchase, showing the order ID and next-steps guidance with links to order history and the catalog.
frontend/src/pages/ProductCatalog.tsx: Product catalog page with search input and category filter buttons that filter the product list, displaying results in a responsive grid with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme tokens (colors via OKLCH variables, fonts, shadows, border radii, animations) and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing the full-stack e-commerce application's architecture, implemented features (catalog, cart, checkout, orders, admin dashboard, theming), and versioning metadata.
